metadata.description: Final submission prep: update figures/tables ordering, verify all assets, clean up and anonymize NHB2026 (actually NMI) manuscript

summary: Completed major manuscript restructuring for Nature Machine Intelligence submission. Verified all figures (8 files), tables (2 main + 4 supplementary), citations (28 references), and anonymization. Both NHB2026/ (modular) and arxiv/ (single-file) versions are consistent and submission-ready. Key changes: rewrote results.tex and supplementary.tex with correct figure/table ordering, updated main.tex header to NMI, synced arxiv/main.tex with all 11 changes, verified all 3 new citations (Elmholdt 2025, Matsui 2024, Ziems 2024).
